title: Cardoso Hosts British International Investment … Reaffirms Commitment to Financial Sector Reform, Long-Term Capital - FinancialEDGE
description: The Governor of the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN), Mr. Olayemi Cardoso, on Wednesday, January 28, 2026, hosted a delegation from British International Investment (BII), led by its Chair, Ms. Diana Layfield, alongside the British High Commissioner to Nigeria, Mr. Richard Montgomery, as part of ongoing efforts to deepen financial sector reforms and attract long-term
